page: Microsoft Azure E4s_v3 is an ESv3-family virtual machine configured with 4 vCPUs and 32.0 GB of RAM, yielding an 8.0 GB memory-to-vCPU ratio. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8171M processor running at 2.6 GHz, this x86_64 architecture server features 2 physical cores with Hyper-Threading enabled and a dedicated CPU allocation. It includes a 35 MB L3 cache and supports instruction sets such as AVX, AVX-512F, AES, and FMA. The instance is Premium Storage capable and includes 66 GB of local storage, with virtualization managed via Microsoft Hyper-V.

Benchmark results indicate that the E4s_v3 sits in the lower performance tiers. In stress-ng CPU tests, both single-core and multi-core performance are categorized in the bottom 25%. Memory bandwidth benchmarks show poor performance, with read-only small block cached speeds at 150.83 GB/sec and large block uncached speeds at 21.57 GB/sec, placing them in the bottom 10%. Geekbench scores also fall into the bottom 10% for single-core and multi-core metrics. For database and web operations, the server achieved 2.53 million operations per second in Redis SET tests and 2.83 GB/sec in static web serving throughput, both ranking in the bottom 25%.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the E4s_v3 offers a high memory-to-vCPU ratio suitable for memory-bound workloads that do not require high-performance compute or high memory bandwidth. Given its weak CPU and memory performance profiles, it is best suited for legacy enterprise applications, small-scale databases, basic web serving, or development and testing environments where memory capacity is prioritized over processing speed.
description: Microsoft Azure E4s_v3 is an ESv3-family virtual machine featuring 4 vCPUs and 32.0 GB of RAM, providing a memory-optimized 1:8 resource ratio. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8171M processor running at 2.6 GHz, this x86_64 instance includes 2 physical cores, Hyper-Threading, a 35 MB L3 cache, and 66 GB of local storage. It is Premium Storage capable and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. Benchmark data positions the E4s_v3 in lower performance tiers, with stress-ng CPU and Geekbench scores falling in the bottom 10% to 25%. Memory bandwidth is also limited, with uncached read speeds at 21.57 GB/sec. Consequently, this server is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-heavy workloads with modest processing demands. It is best suited for small-scale databases, legacy enterprise applications, and basic web serving where memory capacity is more critical than raw compute performance.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E4s_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 4 vCPUs, 32 GB of RAM, and an Intel Xeon 8171M processor, suitable for memory-intensive workloads with modest compute requirements.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E4s_v3 is a memory-optimized VM with 4 vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon processor, designed for modest database and enterprise workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring a high memory-to-vCPU ratio for workloads requiring substantial memory capacity with moderate processing needs.
bullet_points: Configured with 4 vCPUs and 32.0 GB of RAM for a 1:8 memory-to-core ratio
Powered by an Intel Xeon 8171M processor at 2.6 GHz with 35 MB L3 cache
Includes 66 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage
Delivers 2.53 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks
Best suited for small-scale databases and memory-bound legacy applications
